creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #33)
Are you going to also upgrade www/qt5-webengine to 5.13? It seems stuck at 5.12.2:
pkubaj@talos:$~/ports/www/qt5-webengine$ make -V PORTVERSION
5.12.2
pkubaj@talos:$~/ports/www/qt5-webengine$ cd ../../devel/qt5
pkubaj@talos:$~/ports/devel/qt5$ make -V PORTVERSION
5.13.0

I was going to try merging Void's patches for ppc64 (https://github.com/void-linux/void-packages/tree/master/srcpkgs/qt5/patches), but they seem to have jumped from 5.11 to 5.13.
